title: Eligibility
doc_html:
§5003. Eligibility

            To be eligible for an award, a student shall meet all applicable initial eligibility requirements.

            Acts 2015, No. 227, §1.
doc_text:
§5003.  Eligibility
To be eligible for an award, a student shall meet all applicable initial eligibility
requirements.
Acts 2015, No. 227, §1.
